origin.title: Origin
origin.text: tronche was born from a simple observation: modern user-centric applications need avatars. Whether it's for profiles, comments, or chat messages, a unique visual identifier makes the experience more personal and engaging.

inspiration.title: Inspiration
inspiration.text: The amazing boring-avatars project philosophically answered this need perfectly: generate unique avatars from a name, no upload required.
inspiration.limitations: But in practice, it fell short for our use case:
inspiration.limit1: No Nuxt or Vue module available for easy integration
inspiration.limit2: The API service requires immediate payment, no free tier for prototyping
inspiration.limit3: Very restrictive domain management: only 1 production domain and 1 development domain
inspiration.limit4: Any change requires waiting 24 hours to take effect

solution.title: Our solution
solution.text: Faced with zero practicality when using the boring-avatars API, the simplest path was to create our own service. tronche is an open-source, self-hostable avatar generation service with a REST API, a Nuxt module, and a Vue component. It's designed to be truly easy to use.

usedBy.title: Used by
usedBy.text: tronche is already powering avatars in production on
